name: Hackdrop
description: Your daily drop of GitHub Trending and Hacker News, in every new tab.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src https://hackdrop-api.theedoran.xyz; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; object-src 'none'
